name: SG 553 | 豹灯蛾
descriptionEn: The terrorist-exclusive SG553 is a premium scoped alternative to the AK47 for effective long-range engagement. It has been custom painted with a moth wing pattern. Valeria is getting bolder... the time has come to take the fight to her - Felix Riley, Commanding Officer
descriptionZh: T专用的 SG553 是一把适用于远距离交战的 AK47 替代品。 这把武器使用蛾翅的图案进行了自定义涂装。 瓦莱里娅真是愈加胆大妄为… 是时候向她发起战斗了 - 指挥官费利克斯.莱利
